message:
test(store): add dirty counter regression tests for stream group ops

4 new tests verifying that stream group mutations correctly increment
the dirty counter (required for AOF persistence):
- XREADGROUP with new entries
- XCLAIM ownership transfer
- XGROUP CREATE
- XGROUP DESTROY

Also: exhaustive is_write_command guard test in fr-command that
cross-checks every COMMAND_TABLE entry with "write" flag.

Adapted for concurrent API changes (StreamClaimOptions field renames,
xclaim by-value parameter).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
